texto: A Lady in Waiting...Recklessly abandons herself to the Lordship of ChristDiligently uses her single daysTrusts God with unwavering faithDemonstrates virtue in daily lifeLoves God with undistracted devotionStands for physical and emotional purityLives in securityResponds to life in contentment Makes choices based on her convictionsWaits patiently for God to meet her needs
explicacao: Citação de Jackie Kendall sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “A Lady in Waiting...Recklessly abandons herself to the Lordship of ChristDiligently uses her sing…” articula fe, jesus, singleness em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como singleness.
